# Scaffa


> All-in-one CLI tool for scaffolding production-ready frontend projects with React or Vue

Scaffa eliminates repetitive setup work by providing pre-configured templates with TypeScript, TailwindCSS, component libraries, routing, state management, and internationalization already in place.

## Quick Start

```bash
npx create-scaffa@latest
```

Or with flags:
```bash
npx create-scaffa@latest my-app -t react -p pnpm
npx create-scaffa@latest my-app -t vue -p npm
```

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://scaffa.vercel.app/docs/getting-started/installation)
- [React Template](https://scaffa.vercel.app/docs/templates/react)
- [Vue Template](https://scaffa.vercel.app/docs/templates/vue)
- [CLI Reference](https://scaffa.vercel.app/docs/reference/cli)

## Key Files

- [CLI Entry Point](packages/create-scaffa/bin/index.js): Main CLI executable
- [Template Definitions](packages/create-scaffa/templates.js): Available templates configuration
- [React Backbone Template](packages/create-scaffa/templates/react/backbone): Minimal React setup
- [React Colorful Template](packages/create-scaffa/templates/react/colorful): Full React example
- [Vue Backbone Template](packages/create-scaffa/templates/vue/backbone): Minimal Vue setup
- [Vue Colorful Template](packages/create-scaffa/templates/vue/colorful): Full Vue example

## Templates

Each framework offers two variants:

| Framework | Variant | Description |
|-----------|---------|-------------|
| React | Backbone | Minimal setup with essential configuration |
| React | Colorful | Full example with UI components and multiple pages |
| Vue | Backbone | Minimal setup with essential configuration |
| Vue | Colorful | Full example with UI components and multiple pages |

## Tech Stack (All Templates)

- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- Vite
- Component Library (ShadcN UI for React, Reka UI for Vue)
- TanStack Query (server state)
- Axios (HTTP client)
- Routing (React Router / Vue Router)
- Internationalization (i18next / Vue I18n)
- ESLint + Prettier

## CLI Options

- `-t, --template`: Framework choice (`react` or `vue`)
- `-p, --package`: Package manager (`npm` or `pnpm`)

## Project Structure

```
scaffa/
├── packages/create-scaffa/     # CLI tool (npm: create-scaffa)
│   ├── bin/                    # CLI source code
│   └── templates/              # Template sources
├── src/                        # Documentation website (SvelteKit)
├── content/docs/               # Documentation markdown
└── static/                     # Static assets
```

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 20.0.0
- npm or pnpm

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/wyMinLwin/scaffa
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-scaffa
- Website: https://scaffa.vercel.app
- License: MIT
